context_notes: Phase 13 plans are executed and merged. Backend hardening commit 1d3750b passed backend tests. Uncommitted frontend/backend review fixes include runManaged lifecycle, status ref, cancel semantics, typed notes-preview keys, tag source-text skip parity, activeLibraryId usage, and allowControls gating for aggregate tag/embedding jobs. Automated gates pass: backend 94, frontend 263, schema drift false, codebase drift skipped no-structure-md, code review passed zero findings, security passed threats_open 0. On 2026-05-07, user corrected the live frontend target to http://localhost:5173/library and chose UI-only UAT. UI-only UAT verified ResearchOS loads, selectable rows exist after library context loads, selecting 3 rows exposes expected bulk actions, and confirmation modals open for all four Phase 13 operations without clicking Start/Proceed. User accepted UI-only UAT as sufficient for Phase 13 completion.
